title: Mexican Tlayudas
description: A Mexican flatbread dish topped with creamy sauce, rice, and noodles.

ingredients.name: Mexican Sauce
ingredients.notes: creamy sauce made with sour cream, lime juice, and spices

ingredients.name: Shredded Cheese
ingredients.notes: shredded Monterey Jack or Cheddar cheese

instructions: Bake the tlayudas for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
In a large skillet, heat the Mexican sauce over medium heat.
Add the cooked rice and noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the chopped cilantro, diced onion, and shredded cheese to the skillet and stir to combine.
Spoon the rice and noodle mixture onto the baked tlayudas.
Return the tlayudas to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the tlayudas from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
